hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *.php ]] && php -l "$file" || true

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *.php ]] && phpstan analyse --no-progress "$file" 2>&1 || true
